summary: Iteration 57 - Beat Purchase Flow with License Contracts. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working correctly. Fixed API URL prefix issue in AdminContractsPage.jsx.
passed_tests: Backend: Login with submitkalmori@gmail.com works
Backend: GET /api/beats returns list of beats with prices
Backend: POST /api/beats/contract/sign - creates signed contract with contract_id, license_terms, amount, signer_name
Backend: POST /api/beats/contract/sign - returns 404 for non-existent beat
Backend: POST /api/beats/contract/sign - returns 400 for invalid license_type
Backend: GET /api/beats/contract/{contract_id} - returns contract details (owner or admin only)
Backend: GET /api/beats/contract/{contract_id}/pdf - returns PDF file (Content-Type: application/pdf)
Backend: POST /api/beats/purchase/checkout - returns 400 without valid contract_id
Backend: POST /api/beats/purchase/checkout - creates Stripe checkout session with contract
Backend: GET /api/admin/contracts - returns list of all contracts (admin only)
Backend: GET /api/admin/contracts - returns 403 for non-admin
Backend: All 4 license types work (basic_lease, premium_lease, unlimited_lease, exclusive)
Backend: Contract contains complete license terms (name, rights, file_types, streams, sales, music_video, credit, ownership, duration)
Backend: Contract access denied for users who didn't sign it
Frontend: Navigate to /instrumentals page loads correctly
Frontend: Beat catalog displays 6 beats with buy buttons
Frontend: Step 1 - License selection modal shows 4 tiers (Basic $29.99, Premium $79.99, Unlimited $149.99, Exclusive $499.99)
Frontend: Step 1 - REVIEW CONTRACT button navigates to Step 2
Frontend: Step 2 - Contract page shows ORDER SUMMARY, LICENSE TERMS table, BINDING TERMS, DIGITAL SIGNATURE section
Frontend: Step 2 - Signer name input (data-testid=signer-name-input) present
Frontend: Step 2 - Agree checkbox (data-testid=agree-terms-checkbox) present
Frontend: Step 2 - SIGN & PAY button disabled until name entered AND checkbox checked
Frontend: Step 2 - BACK button returns to license selection step
Frontend: Admin /admin/contracts page loads with stats (Total, Paid, Pending, Revenue)
Frontend: Admin contracts page shows contracts table with all columns
Frontend: Admin contracts page has search and status filter
Frontend: Admin contracts page has PDF download button for each contract
seed_data_creation: Test contracts created during backend testing for contract signing verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 tested the new beat purchase flow with license contracts. The flow is: 1) Select license tier on /instrumentals, 2) Review contract terms + type full name + check agreement box, 3) Backend signs contract then creates Stripe checkout session. Contracts are stored in beat_contracts collection. PDF generation uses reportlab. Admin can view all contracts at /admin/contracts. Fixed API URL prefix issue in AdminContractsPage.jsx (was missing /api prefix). All 4 license types work: basic_lease ($29.99), premium_lease ($79.99), unlimited_lease ($149.99), exclusive ($499.99). Contract signing requires signer_name and agree checkbox before SIGN & PAY button enables.

backend.POST /api/beats/contract/sign: Creates signed contract with all license terms
backend.GET /api/beats/contract/{id}/pdf: Returns PDF file with Content-Type: application/pdf
backend.POST /api/beats/purchase/checkout: Requires valid contract_id, creates Stripe session

frontend.step1_license_selection: 4 tiers with prices, REVIEW CONTRACT button
frontend.step2_contract_review: ORDER SUMMARY, LICENSE TERMS table, BINDING TERMS, DIGITAL SIGNATURE
frontend.button_validation: SIGN & PAY disabled until name + checkbox filled

admin_contracts_page.table: Contract ID, Buyer, Beat, License, Amount, Status, Actions
